text: Quick read on the portfolio — anything I should worry about today?

Net liquidation is $500K with leverage at 1.8x and a 22% cushion — comfortable territory. Daily P&L is +$1,234 (+0.25% of NLV). NVDA is your largest weight at ~31%; no earnings inside the next week, so event risk is quiet. Nothing actionable today.
What would a 20% equity drawdown do to my margin?

A -20% shock on ~$900K gross exposure takes roughly $180K off NLV (about -36%), dropping the cushion from 22% to ~4% and pushing leverage toward 2.2x. That's elevated margin-call territory — the usual levers are trimming the largest position or adding cash before the event, not after.
